prompt.content:
What will be the 2023 taxable income of Redwood Components Inc., if we updated the gross revenue with actual sales transactions in 2023? Assume:
- No intermediaries
- FX rate conversions per PLN FX data, the FX conversion to USD is done on the transaction date. If there is no FX rate for a given day, the FX rate from previous available day rate should be used
- Same returns & allowances ratio and COGS ratio (to gross sales) as it currently is in trial balance
- Same selling, R&D, interest and other income (net) $ expenses
- Adjust the pretax book income with the permanent differences and depreciation timing adjustments to calculate the taxable income (found in book-tax tie-out)

State the final answer in USD rounding it to 2 decimal places

rubrics.name: States that the 2023 taxable income of Redwood Components Inc., if we updated... (ver_b6d332dec50e46829f51e8a8090904db)

messages.content: States that the 2023 taxable income of Redwood Components Inc., if we updated the gross revenue with actual transactions, is $29,075,735.76 (acceptable range $29,075,685.76 to $29,075,785.76).

golden_responses.golden_text_response: The 2023 taxable income of Redwood Components Inc., if we updated the gross revenue with actual transactions, is $29,075,735.76
